series_metadata.series_description: Documents legal action by Office of the Attorney General (AGO) on regulated community who has committed a crime such as polluting, illegal transportation, or illegal dumping. Records include, but are not limited to, pleadings, memorandum, affidavits, attorney work product, legal research, motions, judgments, complaints, indictments, discovery, evidence, transcripts, correspondence, settlement and negotiation documents, and hearing and deposition materials.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: case closing ; Paper: case closing
